historical_period_text: Unless mentioned otherwise, all information is requested for fiscal years 2022, 2023, 2024, and YTD Feb-26, plus the corresponding YTD Feb-25 period.

items.request_text: Consolidating financial statements - Please provide consolidating financial statements by entity and elimination column for the historical periods.
Management add-back support - Please provide support for all management adjustments, including detailed sub-ledgers and third-party support where available.

sections.title: If audited (and workpaper access necessary / reconciliation to the audit not straight-forward)

items.request_text: Access to audit workpapers - Please provide access to audit workpapers or the information needed to request access.
Shared costs - Please provide a summary of shared services, allocated amounts, and the methodology used to allocate each cost to the Target.
TSA / Reverse TSA costs - Please provide the preliminary assessment of TSA and reverse TSA needs, to the extent operated on a stand-alone basis.
